ddls:
CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "rev_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being revised */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or description of the revision */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the revision was made */,
  "logged_in" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user was logged in */,
  "ns" TEXT /* Namespace of the article (e.g., article, user) */,
  "sample" TEXT /* Sample type (e.g., random) */,
  "split" TEXT /* Split type (e.g., train, test) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the revision */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the revision (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the revision */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the revision (if applicable) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the article was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the article was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the article */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the article has received */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating of the article */,
  "locked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the article is locked for editing */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the article is featured */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, administrator, reader) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revision_history" (
  "rev_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision history entry */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being revised */,
  "rev_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current revision */,
  "prev_rev_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous revision */,
  "next_rev_id" INTEGER /* ID of the next revision */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made in the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rev_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revision_history_rev_id FOREIGN KEY ("rev_id") REFERENCES revisions ("rev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revision_history_prev_rev_id FOREIGN KEY ("prev_rev_id") REFERENCES revisions ("rev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revision_history_next_rev_id FOREIGN KEY ("next_rev_id") REFERENCES revisions ("rev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revision_history_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the discussion is linked to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the discussion */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the discussion */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the discussion */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time the discussion was started */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the discussion (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the discussion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion the comment is part of */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time the comment was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the comment (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the article */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* The rating value (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time the rating was given */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Optional comment associated with the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the tag (e.g., article, discussion, revision) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "article_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-tag relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the tag for the article (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_tags" (
  "discussion_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion-tag relationship */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the tag for the discussion (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_tags_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revision_tags" (
  "revision_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision-tag relationship */,
  "rev_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revision */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the tag for the revision (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revision_tags_rev_id FOREIGN KEY ("rev_id") REFERENCES revisions ("rev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revision_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)
